lines: Thecla closes a medicine case before the dust from a passing cart can reach it.
"Tell me whether you need care or supplies. Screening is care with forms attached."

choices.label: Request treatment for the charity cots
Leave Thecla to the clinic case

lines: "I can take the unstable patients under Aurelia’s urgent exception. I need names for dosing, not custody."
"Bring Joanna’s fever notes. I will bring the screen to her if the line cannot move."

choices.label: Leave Thecla to the clinic case

lines: "Dressings are open stock. The suppressant price includes the seal I must answer for."

choices.label: Leave Thecla to the clinic case
